faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Hewlett typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free in-home inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours to complete, depending on your home's size. Heat treatments can often be completed in a single day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to ensure complete elimination of all life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe when applied by our certified technicians. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out of treated areas for 2-4 hours. Heat treatments are chemical-free and rooms can be reoccupied immediately after cooling down.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day emergency bed bug service throughout Hewlett and the Five Towns area, subject to availability. We understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and prioritize rapid response to prevent the problem from spreading. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment.
